data.title: What's Going On With Palantir Technologies Stock Today?
data.description: R1 and Palantir Technologies Inc (NASDAQ: PLTR) have partnered to create R37, an AI lab aimed at revolutionizing healthcare reimbursement processes. By combining R1's expertise in revenue cycle management and Palantir's AI tools, the collaboration is set to improve efficiency and accuracy in healthcare financial outcomes.

What's Going On With Guess? Inc. Stock On Friday?
data.description: Guess?, Inc. (GES) stock is up 2.59% in premarket trading following a new five-year licensing agreement to expand rag & bone's handbag line.

data.title: Using Options To Trade Counter-Trend Rallies
data.description: How to identify and trade rallies in a market downturn using options? David Pinsen, founder of Portfolio Armor, offers his expert insights.

data.title: Panama Greenlights Cobre Panama's Exports, Setting Stage For Future Negotiations
data.description: Panama's Cobre Panama mine may be resolved as President Mulino authorizes export of stockpiled copper concentrate. Economy suffers from closure.
